LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A.'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSION OF TRUTH OF FACTS BE ADMITTED IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT LAMU S. RYAVEC FAILED TO TIMELY RESPOND TO THIS DISCOVERY AND HAS THEREBY WAIVED OBJECTIONS. (CCP 2033.280(A).) THE TRUTH OF ANY MATTERS SPECIFIED IN THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION IS DEEMED ADMITTED BY DEFENDANT. (CCP 2033.280(B), (C).) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-14-27 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted; Memorandum In Support; Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Aug-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted.

Plaintiff Capital One, N.A.'s motion to deem admitted the truth of any matters specified in its requests for admission, set one, is granted. Defendant Lamu S. Ryavec failed to timely respond to this discovery and has thereby waived objections. (CCP 2033.280(a).) The truth of any matters specified in the requests for admission is deemed admitted by Defendant. (CCP 2033.280(b), (c).)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Set For Trial On Sep-22-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
